import React from 'react'; import { TrendingUp, Users, ArrowUpRight, Activity, Zap, Download } from 'lucide-react'; export default function Analytics() { const stats = [ { label: 'Active Users', value: '2.4k', growth: '+12%', icon: }, { label: 'Total Barters', value: '842', growth: '+18%', icon: }, { label: 'Success Rate', value: '94%', growth: '+2%', icon: }, ]; return (
{/* HEADER */}

Analytics

Usage Patterns & Growth

{/* TOP STAT CARDS */}
{stats.map((stat, i) => (

{stat.label}

{stat.value}

{stat.growth}
{stat.icon}
))}
{/* TRENDS & ACTIVITY SECTION */}
{/* ACTIVITY TRENDS (MOCK CHART) */}

Activity Trends

{/* MOCK VISUAL GRAPH */}
{[40, 70, 45, 90, 65, 80, 100].map((height, i) => (
{height * 12}
Day {i+1}
))}

System Pulse

{[ { user: 'Rahul K.', action: 'New Barter', time: '2m ago' }, { user: 'Gouri', action: 'Accepted Request', time: '15m ago' }, { user: 'Admin', action: 'System Update', time: '1h ago' }, { user: 'Suresh V.', action: 'Joined', time: '3h ago' }, ].map((log, i) => (

{log.user}

{log.action}

{log.time}
))}
); }
